completed_tasks.name: Resume project context and verify Phase 9 status
Fix MCP documentation path errors and outdated architecture description

decisions.decision: Fix sqlite3 connection leak in EmbeddingCache by explicit conn.close()
decisions.rationale: sqlite3.connect context manager does not auto-close; this was the root cause of ResourceWarnings

decisions.decision: Use Database context manager in tests/test_sif_complete.py
decisions.rationale: Prevents unclosed sqlite3 connections in smoke tests
Ensures ConnectionPool tests clean up released connections
